## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::SportShoe;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        SportShoe { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
footwear, sports, running, athletic, shoe, sneaker, training, exercise, fitness

sports
